case_title: LEON WILLIAM AROSTEQUIS VS. CYNTHIA NANCY HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-15-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LEON WILLIAM AROSTEQUIS. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA NANCY HERNANDEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY AROSTEQUIS, LEON WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CYNTHIA NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/20/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
